channel.title: Jarkko Moilanen - Insights
channel.description: Writing on data products, AI product portfolios, open standards, governance, and delivery.

item.title: The operating system for data and AI products
item.description: Why data and AI initiatives need an operating system that joins strategy, standards, software, governance, and delivery.

item.title: The SDK is not the lock-in
item.description: A good SDK should make a standard easier to adopt without trapping teams in one vendor, tool, or workflow.

item.title: Why portfolios matter before AI delivery starts
item.description: AI delivery works better when demand is shaped as a portfolio before teams start building individual solutions.

item.title: Agent-ready data products need more than metadata
item.description: Agents need product definitions, trust signals, constraints, ownership, and context, not only technical metadata.
